deadline_notes: Biennial ending December 14 (per statute § 440.08(2)). Period: December 15, 2025 – December 14, 2027.
notes: DISTINCTIVE: December 14 deadline (not December 31). 40hr formal/instructor-led minimum — unusual half-must-be-formal requirement. 20hr annual minimum. 40hr carryover. No A&A mandate.
